creator: masaaki@netaid.or.jp
text:
Perhaps, the source archive on MASTER_SITES has been updated without a version number.

% curl -I http://www.tehinterweb.co.uk/roundcube/plugins/sieverules.tar.gz
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Date: Thu, 25 Apr 2013 21:28:46 GMT
Last-Modified: Tue, 16 Apr 2013 06:54:05 GMT
      :

How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/mail/roundcube-sieverules
# make fetch
===>  License GPLv3 accepted by the user
=> sieverules.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.tehinterweb.co.uk/roundcube/plugins/sieverules.tar.gz
fetch: http://www.tehinterweb.co.uk/roundcube/plugins/sieverules.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 130304, actual 136718
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/sieverules.tar.gz
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/sieverules.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 130304, actual 129704
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** [do-fetch] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/roundcube-sieverules.
